Millions of business outcomes
We've received a lot of love from our customers. Here's what they have to say.
Creator
92M views|79K followers

Super easy to use and perfect for making funny, viral AI videos. You don’t need any editing skills—just pick a video, type your script, and Yapper does the rest. Great tool for creators looking to boost engagement fast! I grew my account from 30M to 92M views in the last month.

@captainn
Creator
100M views|89K followers

Yapper has genuinely changed the game for me. Having all the tools in one place makes it super easy to go from idea to finished video fast. I’ve used it to create content that’s now pulled in over 100 million total views across platforms. The customization, voice realism, and speed make Yapper a must-have for any creator trying to scale.

@royalty

Humor was 10/10 given that it’s AI, and 8/10 what I would expect if I paid $3,000 on Cameo for Seinfeld to personally roast me.

Alex, CA

I just tried out Yapper's lip-syncing and made a couple of roasts with stories from my friends bachelor party and wedding and it was hilarious. Everyone in the group loved it and laughed liked crazy. I cant recommend it enough!

Thorgeir, Iceland

I showed my girlfriend her video today for her birthday and it was a huge hit. Can’t wait to tell everyone about it.

Dan, TX

200M views|327K followers

Yapper has been super easy to use, I just started 2 weeks ago and already made over $1000. Great app that is constantly evolving and adding more features

@funnyfromai

190M views|190K followers

Yapper has been a game-changer for me. It’s super easy to use, and since I started creating AI videos with them, my views have tripled to 9M views this month. The tools make content creation way faster, and the results speak for themselves.

@deep.seavisitor

I made a video and sent it in our group chat. It was a huge hit with my family.

Mike, DC

The first one was so perfect. I am going to use this for all of the special occasions moving forward. And I am going to tell everyone about it. I bet this is going to blow up. I’m rooting for you!

Drew, AZ

He absolutely loved it. I was worried because it was such a brutal roast hahaha. I sent it to tons of people and reactions have been awesome.

Pierre, NYC

The lip-sync video was amazing. Thank you for making def a top 3 present of all time 😭

Omar, SF
Creator
45M views|81K followers

AI video generation is only getting better, and Yapper has been a great place to stay updated with the most advanced AI media systems. Their tools have helped us scale our page, income up to 2k per month, and content delivery exponentially

@ontheway.ai
Creator
14M views|5K followers

Using yapper is great as I’m able to use AI with templates to create consistent outputs. It was also really difficult to post videos with political figures with deep fakes but Yappers built in system makes it more convenient. I’ve also been able to monetize my AI account and earn money each month from various opportunities.

@jamesthegaijin

My friend was in stitches and I was eagerly waiting for him to respond. He texted, “I did not need that at this early in the morning,” but it was brilliant. It was the best $9 I spent.

Sean, UK

The lip-sync is so direct to the point that I didn’t send to my friend yet, otherwise he might be offended. But the results are amazing. 100% realistic.

Robert, Netherlands

I made a lip-sync video to roast my girlfriend, she was not happy and left the room. It was brilliant and got the reaction from her I wanted. It totally exceeded my expectations.
